MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to Strike Punitive Damages is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Motion To Strike Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT HAWK LOU'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages is continued to August 28, 2013 for moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the amendment to complaint to department 501 no later than August 22, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HAWK LOU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Complaint alleges residential use of the premises pursuant to agreement with landlord (2) rendering applicability of SFRO and warranty of habitability an issue of fact not appropriate to be raised on demurrer. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HAWK LOU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts supporting request for punitive damages. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
